_source: Hand-mirrored from src/audio/AmbientManager.ts BUILDERS at the time of authorship. Update both files when adding/removing presets. The level builder UI fetches this list to populate the section ambient-preset dropdown for landscape levels.

presets.label: Morning Market
presets.description: Soft chimes, market stall murmur, dawn light

presets.label: Temple Garden
presets.description: Wind through bamboo, koi pond, mid-day calm

presets.label: River Bridge
presets.description: Flowing water, distant bells, footsteps on wood

presets.label: Festival Grounds
presets.description: Crowd hum, paper lanterns rustling, drums in the distance

presets.label: Night Harbor
presets.description: Boat bells, lapping waves, evening crickets
